transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Welcome to ShopEase. I’m your AI shopping assistant, here to help you find products, track orders, and answer questions anytime. How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I’m looking for a good pair of running shoes.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Sure! I can help with that. Are you looking for daily training shoes, or long distance running shoes?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. Do you have a preferred budget or brand, or should I suggest our best sellers?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Based on customer reviews, I recommend the FlexRun Pro running shoes. They’re lightweight, breathable, and great for daily runs.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: They’re priced at four thousand nine hundred ninety nine rupees, and available in your size. Would you like to check color options, or add them to your cart?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Done. The FlexRun Pro shoes are now added to your cart.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Many runners also buy ankle socks or fitness trackers. Would you like me to show you some options?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: No problem at all. Would you like help with checkout, or should I send you a reminder later?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Alright. I’ll send you a gentle reminder, and if available, a limited time discount.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Before I go, is there anything else I can assist you with — like order tracking, returns, or store policies?

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thanks for shopping with ShopEase. Have a great day.
